intended_platform: Google AI Studio and Nano Banana reference-driven image generation

core_generation_rules.reference_usage: Use the listed attachments in the shown order. Likeness references always outrank style references. Keep the same core likeness anchors across adjacent prompts whenever possible.
core_generation_rules.prose_standard: Write prompts like a luxury creative director briefing an editorial photographer and retoucher.

prompts.title: Black-and-White Hollywood Glam Close Portrait
prompts.use_case: Homepage hero fade sequence opener or premium editorial key art
prompts.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white hero portrait of the attached woman with old-Hollywood restraint and modern editorial precision. Preserve her exact face architecture, jaw taper, cheekbone structure, refined nose line, natural lip shape, and athletic feminine presence. Use sculpted luminous studio light, rich grayscale separation, polished hair, and poised direct eye contact. Keep the image timeless, expensive, elegant, strong, and text-safe for a premium homepage rather than retro-costumed, overly sexy, or generically glamorous. Preserve skin texture, believable asymmetry, and a true recognizable likeness.
prompts.recommended_framing: tight head-and-shoulders portrait with elegant headroom and a calm text-safe side lane
prompts.export_goal: Approve the facial anchor portrait first, then adapt the approved look for hero and editorial crops.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Preserve the attached woman exactly as an adult elegant athletic blonde-bronde subject with refined bone structure and believable asymmetry.
facial_feature_preservation: keep the long oval face shape and cheekbone width
preserve the straight refined nose and natural lip volume
keep the jaw feminine and defined rather than softened or squared off
anti_drift: do not drift into retro cosplay or generic beauty-campaign sameness

camera_language.capture_feel: precise studio portrait with expensive optical discipline
camera_language.lens_behavior: 85mm portrait compression with clean facial proportions and soft edge rolloff
camera_language.focus_strategy: critical focus on the near eye with crisp lip and cheek detail

lighting_language.key_light_character: soft directional beauty light with sculpted cheekbone definition
lighting_language.shadow_behavior: velvety cinematic falloff with readable eye sockets and jaw contour
lighting_language.skin_treatment: retain pores, lip texture, and realistic tonal transitions

styling_language.wardrobe: minimal black styling with no distracting trim
styling_language.grooming: polished editorial hair with controlled volume
styling_language.makeup: monochrome-friendly glam with restraint, not costume makeup

environment_language.spatial_mood: quiet studio drama with no clutter
environment_language.background_strategy: deep monochrome backdrop with gentle tonal lift for hair separation

cinematic_language.visual_arc: stillness becoming iconography in a single frame
cinematic_language.editorial_energy: old-Hollywood poise interpreted through modern campaign discipline

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep a clean low-detail lane on one side for homepage headline and CTA copy.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Protect forehead, eyes, nose line, chin, and top of shoulders inside a centered vertical crop zone.

skin_texture_rules: preserve fine skin texture and natural under-eye detail
avoid waxy retouching or porcelain blur

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: Use the three likeness files as anchors. Add the black-and-white style image last so mood influences the portrait without replacing identity.

prompts.title: Luxury Fitness Studio Portrait
prompts.use_case: Homepage secondary hero, coaching section banner, or services lead image
prompts.prompt: Create a luxury fitness studio portrait of the attached woman in a refined minimalist training environment with calm authority and premium editorial realism. Preserve her true face, hair tone, athletic proportions, and any naturally visible tattoo accuracy. Use elevated activewear, soft high-end studio lighting, believable posture, and a clean expensive space that signals discipline and trust rather than intensity or aggression. Keep room for website copy, preserve real skin texture, and avoid generic stock-gym energy.
prompts.recommended_framing: mid-length to three-quarter portrait with room for website text and clean shoulder-line separation
prompts.export_goal: Approve a wide homepage-ready studio image before any finishing pass or crop variations.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Keep the subject recognizable as the same athletic feminine woman from the likeness references, with facial structure preserved ahead of styling.
facial_feature_preservation: preserve eye spacing, nose line, jaw taper, and natural lip shape
keep the face adult, elegant, and athletic rather than generic wellness-model pretty
anti_drift: do not let studio polish turn into beauty-filter drift
maintain real body proportions and subtle tattoo logic

camera_language.capture_feel: high-end editorial portrait with controlled fitness context
camera_language.lens_behavior: 85mm to 100mm portrait compression with honest proportions
camera_language.focus_strategy: sharp eyes and clean fabric detail with soft background falloff

lighting_language.key_light_character: soft architectural light that wraps the face and shoulders
lighting_language.shadow_behavior: gentle sculpting that keeps the body toned but believable
lighting_language.skin_treatment: healthy skin realism with pores and tonal nuance intact

styling_language.wardrobe: elevated black or neutral activewear with luxury fit and minimal branding
styling_language.grooming: clean polished hair and refined athletic presentation
styling_language.makeup: subtle editorial structure with no influencer-heavy contour

environment_language.background_strategy: clean studio lines and refined equipment kept secondary to the portrait

cinematic_language.visual_arc: strength translated as quiet command rather than action spectacle
cinematic_language.editorial_energy: premium campaign calm with warm authority

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Reserve a broad calm side field for section headline copy and service messaging.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Keep face, upper torso, and strongest shoulder line inside the central crop-safe corridor for mobile reuse.
composition_language.subject_placement: offset from center with clear negative space

skin_texture_rules: keep real skin and fabric response under soft light
avoid plastic smoothing and fake muscle carving

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: Keep the black wardrobe and studio-clean styling consistent across likeness and style references. Likeness comes first.

prompts.title: Warm Neutral Editorial Headshot
prompts.use_case: About page, press-style profile image, or trust-building biography section
prompts.prompt: Create a warm neutral editorial headshot of the attached woman for a premium trainer and fitness personality website. Preserve her exact face shape, eye structure, jawline, lip proportions, and refined athletic beauty. Use warm beige, soft stone, or oat-toned styling, flattering editorial light, subtle grooming, and direct but approachable eye contact. The portrait should feel polished, grounded, modern, and luxurious, with real skin texture, believable asymmetry, and enough calm frame space to support website layout needs.
prompts.recommended_framing: tight vertical portrait from chest up with breathing room around head and shoulders
prompts.export_goal: Approve as the primary trust portrait before wider hero and story variations.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Preserve the same elegant athletic woman from the likeness references with no beauty-filter drift or generic wellness-face replacement.
facial_feature_preservation: keep face length, cheekbone definition, light-eye structure, jaw taper, and refined nose line
preserve real lip shape and believable asymmetry
anti_drift: warm color grading must not soften facial identity
keep the expression human, credible, and adult

camera_language.capture_feel: intimate editorial portrait with premium magazine clarity
camera_language.lens_behavior: 85mm portrait compression with natural facial honesty
camera_language.focus_strategy: sharp eyes, clean skin detail, soft ear and background falloff

lighting_language.key_light_character: creamy directional softness with flattering facial shape
lighting_language.shadow_behavior: delicate cheek and jaw contour without muddiness
lighting_language.skin_treatment: retain pores, lip texture, and realistic tonal variation

styling_language.wardrobe: neutral refined wardrobe in stone, beige, taupe, oat, or soft black
styling_language.grooming: clean polished hair with natural movement
styling_language.makeup: subtle editorial enhancement rather than beauty-ad glam

environment_language.background_strategy: soft neutral background with no distracting color noise

cinematic_language.editorial_energy: quiet luxury and human warmth rather than spectacle

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep one outer frame edge calm and uncluttered for optional biography copy or quote overlays.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Protect the full head, shoulders, and upper torso in a tall safe zone so vertical crops remain balanced.
composition_language.subject_placement: near-center with slight offset for layout flexibility

skin_texture_rules: preserve natural pores, lip texture, and realistic under-eye detail

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: The peach/yellow style image should only steer warmth and polish. Keep the final palette neutral, restrained, and expensive.

prompts.title: Premium Rooftop Athletic Portrait
prompts.use_case: Homepage scroll transition, coaching page hero, or movement-focused banner
prompts.prompt: Create a premium rooftop athletic portrait of the attached woman in soft luxury evening light. Preserve her exact facial structure, realistic athletic build, hair tone, and subtle tattoo accuracy. Show elegant physical strength and trainer credibility with composed posture, elevated activewear, and a modern rooftop setting that feels cinematic rather than sporty-commercial. Keep breathable negative space for web design, preserve believable skin and body detail, and avoid cluttered skyline noise or generic influencer posing.
prompts.recommended_framing: wide three-quarter athletic portrait with environmental context, elegant negative space, and crop-safe headroom
prompts.export_goal: Approve a wide rooftop image for homepage and section transitions before upscale or crop variants.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Keep the rooftop image fully tied to the facial likeness references, with body styling secondary to identity.
facial_feature_preservation: preserve face shape, nose line, jaw contour, lips, and eye spacing
keep the subject adult, athletic, feminine, and recognizable
anti_drift: do not let outdoor atmosphere push the face toward generic campaign beauty
keep body proportions slim-athletic and believable

camera_language.capture_feel: wide editorial hero with premium outdoor portrait discipline
camera_language.lens_behavior: 70mm to 90mm perspective with graceful environmental compression
camera_language.focus_strategy: subject sharp, skyline and architecture softened into context

lighting_language.key_light_character: soft evening-edge light with polished skin rendering
lighting_language.shadow_behavior: clean shaping along jaw, arms, and torso without sports-ad harshness
lighting_language.skin_treatment: real texture with luminous but restrained highlights

styling_language.wardrobe: elevated activewear in refined tonal colors with no loud branding
styling_language.makeup: light editorial polish that holds up outdoors

environment_language.spatial_mood: modern rooftop luxury with breathable air and architectural calm
environment_language.background_strategy: city context stays elegant and secondary rather than busy or touristy

cinematic_language.visual_arc: athletic authority translated into elegant evening stillness
cinematic_language.editorial_energy: campaign-level calm instead of action-ad aggression

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Leave a generous low-detail side zone for headline and supporting copy.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Keep face, upper torso, and the strongest body line inside the central vertical crop area for mobile hero use.
composition_language.subject_placement: offset from center with horizon and posture supporting the layout

skin_texture_rules: keep realistic skin and fabric texture in evening light
avoid over-graded sunset skin or over-sharpened body detail
anti_generic_ai_face_negatives: no impossible waist or glute exaggeration

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: Use the rooftop body image as the primary composition anchor and keep the face locked with two close likeness references.

prompts.title: Cinematic Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.use_case: Homepage mid-scroll fade, personal story section, or campaign-style brand tile
prompts.prompt: Create a cinematic lifestyle portrait of the attached woman that blends luxury fitness energy with refined personal-brand editorial photography. Preserve her true face, realistic body proportions, and hair tone. Use warm natural contrast, tasteful interior or soft-location styling, and composed feminine confidence. The image should feel intimate, aspirational, and expensive, like a magazine portrait for a high-end trainer brand, with real skin detail, believable posture, and calm negative space for layout flexibility.
prompts.recommended_framing: waist-up or seated three-quarter frame with cinematic composition and one calm text-safe side zone
prompts.export_goal: Approve as a softer brand image that complements the stronger hero and fitness portraits.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Preserve the subject as the same elegant athletic woman from the likeness references, not a generic lifestyle model.
facial_feature_preservation: keep face length, nose line, eye structure, and lip proportions consistent
retain realistic adult asymmetry and recognizable expression
anti_drift: do not let lifestyle warmth genericize the face
keep the mood intimate and premium rather than casual influencer content

camera_language.capture_feel: magazine-style environmental portrait with emotional closeness
camera_language.lens_behavior: 85mm portrait feel or medium telephoto intimacy with soft background separation
camera_language.focus_strategy: eyes and face remain crisp while background shapes dissolve gently

lighting_language.key_light_character: warm natural-leaning editorial light with subtle contrast
lighting_language.shadow_behavior: soft contour that preserves the face and body without drama overload
lighting_language.skin_treatment: real skin and tactile fabric response

styling_language.wardrobe: refined denim, knit, or minimalist fitted styling with quiet luxury tone
styling_language.grooming: soft polished hair with believable movement
styling_language.makeup: restrained editorial grooming, no heavy glam

environment_language.spatial_mood: tasteful interior or soft location with calm luxury cues
environment_language.background_strategy: no clutter, no obvious influencer-signifier props, no cheap decor

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep one side or upper quadrant visually calm for copy overlays without interrupting the portrait mood.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Protect the face and seated or waist-up body line inside a centered vertical crop area.
composition_language.subject_placement: slightly offset with gentle environmental framing

skin_texture_rules: preserve pores, lip detail, and natural tonal transitions

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: Use the seated jeans style image for posture and mood only. Preserve a premium restrained website tone and keep likeness dominant.

prompts.title: Monochrome with Selective Color Hero Portrait
prompts.use_case: Homepage signature hero image or launch campaign banner
prompts.prompt: Create a signature homepage hero portrait of the attached woman using a predominantly monochrome luxury palette with highly restrained selective color. Preserve her exact face, jawline, lip proportions, eye structure, hair tone, and elegant athletic build. The image should feel cinematic, premium, modern, and iconic. Keep the palette mostly black, white, silver, charcoal, or soft grayscale, introducing one accent color only if it strengthens the composition. The selective color must feel luxurious and minimal, never loud, synthetic, or gimmicky. Preserve real skin texture, recognizable identity, and hero-safe negative space.
prompts.recommended_framing: wide hero portrait with strong eye contact, text-safe negative space, and mobile-safe central subject mass
prompts.export_goal: Approve as the highest-impact homepage hero before creating desktop and mobile finals.

subject_lock.identity_anchor: Keep the subject unmistakably tied to the likeness references, with facial structure preserved ahead of all color treatment and mood styling.
facial_feature_preservation: preserve the exact face architecture, jaw taper, straight refined nose, and natural lips
keep athletic elegance and believable asymmetry intact
anti_drift: selective color is secondary to likeness
do not drift into synthetic campaign-face perfection or cyberpunk stylization

camera_language.capture_feel: campaign-ready still frame with graphic discipline
camera_language.lens_behavior: 70mm to 90mm portrait perspective with elegant compression and clean edge separation
camera_language.focus_strategy: face remains crisp, accent-color cue remains controlled and readable

lighting_language.key_light_character: sculpted directional light with polished highlight control
lighting_language.skin_treatment: real skin detail preserved through monochrome grading

styling_language.wardrobe: sleek monochrome styling with one restrained accent-color detail only if elegant
styling_language.grooming: clean editorial hair and refined grooming

environment_language.background_strategy: simplified monochrome environment with no clutter and no gimmick props

cinematic_language.visual_arc: heroic stillness anchored by a single visual hook
cinematic_language.editorial_energy: high-fashion campaign restraint with athletic edge

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Reserve one broad calm field for headline copy so the accent color never competes with typography.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Keep face, upper torso, and accent-color cue inside the central vertical corridor for tight mobile hero crops.
composition_language.subject_placement: offset composition with deliberate luxury negative space

skin_texture_rules: maintain natural pores and tonal transitions even under monochrome treatment
do not posterize or over-smooth the skin

google_ai_studio_attachments.attachment_notes: Attach the monochrome style references last. If using an accent color, keep it singular, restrained, and subordinate to likeness.
